content_markdown:
# "Victory is in the Struggle"
## Scripture
"For God did not give us a spirit of timidity, but a spirit of power and love and self-discipline." – 2 Timothy 1:7
## Reflection
As men, we often view struggle as something to be avoided. We prefer the comfort of our routines and the familiarity of our daily lives. But the Bible reminds us that it's in the midst of struggle that we discover our strength. It's in the battles we fight, the challenges we overcome, and the trials we endure that we develop the character God desires for us. Don't shy away from the struggles of life; instead, view them as opportunities to trust in God and to grow in your faith.

The apostle Paul knew what it meant to struggle. He faced persecution, imprisonment, and even death threats, yet he continued to press on, relying on the power of God to sustain him. As you face your own struggles today, remember that you too have the power of God working within you. Don't give up; instead, draw on His strength and press forward with courage and confidence.

## Daily Challenge
"Do 25 reps of burpees while praying for strength to face your challenges."
